CVE-2024-2002.title: A double-free vulnerability was found in libdwarf. In a multiply- ...
CVE-2024-2002.description: A double-free vulnerability was found in libdwarf. In a multiply-corrupted DWARF object, libdwarf may try to dealloc(free) an allocation twice, potentially causing unpredictable and various results.
